polymarket.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Israel x Iran ceasefire continues through July 25?
Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?
Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by July 31?
Will Mojtaba Khamenei be head of state in Iran end of 2026?
Mitch McConnell steps down from Senate before his term ends?
Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $95 in July?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly ONE paragraph, starting with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Must mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on data. The data includes Fed interest rates: high probability of no change (74% Yes) vs increase 25bps (25% Yes). So expectation: rates likely unchanged. That's somewhat neutral to slightly bullish for equities? Usually no change is seen as supportive. Also Israel-Iran ceasefire continues through July 25: 77% Yes, indicating reduced geopolitical risk -> bullish. US invade Iran before 2027: only 29% Yes, low chance -> bullish. Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control: only 3% Yes, low chance -> suggests status quo, maybe neutral. Mojtaba Khamenei head of state end 2026: 72% Yes, high chance of leadership continuity -> maybe uncertain but indicates expectation of same regime, could be neutral. Mitch McConnell steps down: 42% Yes, moderate uncertainty. WTI Crude Oil hit $95 in July: 58% Yes, slightly more than half expecting price to reach $95, indicating bullish oil sentiment.

Overall sentiment: seems bullish due to stable rates, ceasefire, low invasion risk
